description: Configure Chrome as a public library patron terminal per the ADA-compliant Digital Access Terminal Standard. Read the specification at ~/Desktop/library_terminal_spec.txt. Requirements: Set font sizes (default 20px, fixed 18px, minimum 14px); enable Force Dark Mode, Smooth Scrolling, and Reader Mode flags; block content permissions for all sites (notifications, geolocation, camera, microphone, popups); disable all credential storage (passwords, address autofill, payment autofill); set homepage to https://www.nypl.org; configure startup pages to open nypl.org and digitalcollections.nypl.org; set download directory to /home/ga/Documents/Patron_Downloads with 'always ask' enabled; block third-party cookies, enable Do Not Track, and set Safe Browsing to Enhanced Protection.
